You channel and strike the ground-qi-layered flank of {enemy} for {damage} damage.
enemyAttack: {enemy} catches your guard with a tusk for {damage} damage.
The massive frame drives into you and lands for {damage} damage.
{enemy} pivots faster than expected and hooks you for {damage} damage.
victory: {enemy} stumbles and collapses between the terrace rows, its qi dissipating into the soil.
The boar goes down in the churned earth. The terraces are quiet.
defeat: {enemy} drives you back up the terraces before you can find your footing again.

title: Terraces Cleared
body:
The boar is down. Farmers from the upper terrace make their way along the slope to look. An older woman — soil-dark hands, unreadable face — gives you a long look before nodding once. She says nothing. She does not need to.

The bounty was posted under an Azure Cloud seal. You have earned it.

choices.label: Take the hide and return to town

title: Driven From The Terrace
body:
The spirit boar is larger and more experienced than it first appeared. You retreated intact, which was the correct call. The farmers watching from the upper slope have already disappeared back to their work.

There is no shame in returning when you are better prepared.

choices.label: Return to Iron Bridge Town

title: The River Lantern Inn
body:
The inn faces the central crossroads, its painted lantern swinging above the door in the evening air. Inside: low wooden tables, a brazier already built up against the mountain cold, and the smell of dried soup and old tea. A round-faced woman behind the counter looks up when you enter — a quick, filing glance that doesn't judge and doesn't miss much.

"First time through?" she says. She does not wait for the answer.

choices.label: Ask for a room for the night (1 spirit stone)
Ask what the road gossip is lately
Return to the main street

title: A Night's Rest
body:
The room is small: a sleeping mat, a wooden shutter, walls thick enough to block the crossroads noise. You wake before dawn with no training bells and no qi channeling from the room beside yours.

The mountain cultivates you even when you are not trying. A night away from the sect is its own kind of practice — different silence, different pressure.

choices.label: Wake up and return downstairs

title: Crossroads Gossip
body:
The innkeeper — her name is Shu Yilan, offered without being asked — refills your cup while she talks. Three things before you finish it.

A cultivator in white robes came through two weeks ago and paid for three nights in high-grade spirit stones without looking at the count. He asked about the road to the Jade Spine Mountain and left before dawn on the third morning.

A northern sect has posted missing-disciple notices for three outer disciples who left for a ruins expedition and have not reported back. The notices name a location two days east.

And the old trade road east — the one no caravan wants to use anymore — has been drawing more attention than a dead road should.

choices.label: Thank her and return to the main floor

recordNpcConversation.topic: crossroads_rumours

title: The Notice Board
body:
The board outside the inn holds a dozen postings in various states of weather damage. Trade requests, route advisories, and two bounties. One posting stands out: a spirit beast notice with an Azure Cloud Sect seal stamped in the corner. The sect placed the bounty but did not send anyone to fulfil it.

The text is plain: a spirit boar has damaged the eastern crop terraces for three consecutive growing cycles. The posted reward is three spirit stones on proof of elimination.

choices.label: Spirit Boar Bounty
choices.boardDescription: A spirit boar has been destroying the eastern crop terraces for three growing cycles. Azure Cloud Sect seal. Posted reward on proof of elimination.

choices.label: Collect the posted bounty reward

messages: You present the hide at the notice board and remove the posting. The seal is stamped. Three spirit stones are left in the collection box beneath the board.

choices.label: Return to the main street

title: Mountain Road North
body:
The morning road north is quieter than the afternoon you arrived on. The pass came up sooner than expected — the road crew that had been working the rubble section was gone. Road men tend to move on when the work becomes uncertain.

You reach the outer sect gate as the afternoon light thins. The guard at the lower post gives you the same brief nod as before.

choices.label: Return to the outer sect paths
